categories.description: Public-releasable information; no CUI categories triggered.

categories.long_name: CUI // For Official Use Only (legacy banner)
categories.description: Information requiring protection against public disclosure under FOIA Exemption 2-9. Formerly FOUO. Default catch-all for internal-government-only working documents.
Trade secrets, commercial / financial information obtained from a contractor or vendor that is privileged or confidential.
Personally Identifiable Information (PII) protected under the Privacy Act of 1974 / DoD 5400.11-R.

categories.long_name: CUI // SP-NF (NOFORN — Not Releasable to Foreign Nationals)
categories.description: CUI bearing the NOFORN limited-dissemination control. May not be released to foreign governments, foreign nationals, or coalition partners.
Information identifying critical assets, vulnerabilities, indicators, or sensitive activities under DoDD 5205.02E.
Information subject to ITAR (22 CFR 120-130) or EAR (15 CFR 730-774) export-control restrictions.
Information compiled for law enforcement purposes; investigative / case-file material.
Technical information with military or space application that requires export control under DoDI 5230.24.

caveats.use_when: Document contains U.S.-only operational, technical, or intelligence content.

caveats.expansion: Releasable to USA and Five Eyes partners (GBR, AUS, CAN, NZL)
caveats.use_when: Coalition operations or shared intel with FVEY partners.

caveats.expansion: Releasable to USA, United Kingdom, Australia (AUKUS)
Releasable to USA and NATO members
May be displayed to foreign nationals but not released physically
caveats.use_when: Verbal briefings or screen-only displays to coalition LNOs.
Sensitive personnel or pre-decisional policy material.

reg_anchor: DoDM 5200.01 Vol 2, Encl 4 (CUI Markings) and 32 CFR Part 2002 (CUI Program). Synthetic taxonomy for demo only — not authoritative.
